description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, cylindrical black metal pole with subtle vertical ridges and a slightly flared, ornate base. At the top, it supports a single lantern-style lamp head with a classic, faceted glass enclosure and a pointed finial. The lamp head is framed by metallic trim, giving it a vintage, Victorian-inspired appearance. The base of the pole is wider and decorated with ringed moldings, adding a touch of elegance and stability. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban streets, parks, or historic neighborhoods. The lamppost exudes a timeless charm, blending utility with ornamental detail.
description: A tall, black, cylindrical lamppost with a classic lantern-style lamp head and an ornate, flared base. Its vintage design features subtle decorative moldings and metallic trim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height, ornate base, and the lantern-style lamp head with its faceted glass enclosure.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the slender profile of the pole and the symmetry of the lamp head, with the decorative base still visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the lamp head and the vertical ridges along the pole, with the base's ringed moldings apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the side profile, emphasizing the pole's straightness and the classic design of the lamp head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic Victorian lantern with faceted glass panels and a pointed finial
